serverInfo.name: hexalith-eventstore-admin
serverInfo.description: Hexalith EventStore administration MCP server — query streams, inspect projections, diagnose issues, and manage operations via AI-callable tools

tools.name: projection-pause
tools.description: Pause a running projection to stop event processing (requires confirm: true)

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview

tools.name: tenant-detail
tools.description: Get detailed tenant information including description, status, and creation date

tools.name: projection-reset
tools.description: Reset a projection to rebuild state from a specific event position (requires confirm: true)

fromPosition.description: Event position to reset from (null = beginning)

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Check connectivity to the EventStore Admin API and return server health status

tools.name: consistency-detail
tools.description: Get detailed data integrity check results including anomalies, severity levels, and affected streams

tools.name: storage-overview
tools.description: Get storage usage overview including event counts, sizes, and per-tenant breakdown

tenantId.description: Filter by tenant ID (uses session context if omitted)

tools.name: consistency-trigger
tools.description: Trigger a data integrity check across streams and projections (requires confirm: true)

checkTypes.description: Comma-separated check types: SequenceContinuity, SnapshotIntegrity, ProjectionPositions, MetadataConsistency

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview

tools.name: stream-state
tools.description: Get the aggregate state reconstructed at a specific sequence number (point-in-time state exploration)

sequenceNumber.description: Sequence number to reconstruct state at

tools.name: projection-list
tools.description: List all projections with their current status, lag, and error counts

tenantId.description: Filter by tenant ID (uses session context if omitted)

tools.name: stream-events
tools.description: Get the command/event/query timeline for a specific event stream

tools.name: backup-trigger
tools.description: Trigger a full backup for a tenant (requires confirm: true)

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview

tools.name: stream-event-detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific event including its payload and metadata

tools.name: stream-list
tools.description: List recently active event streams, optionally filtered by tenant and domain

tenantId.description: Filter by tenant ID (uses session context if omitted)

domain.description: Filter by domain (uses session context if omitted)

tools.name: stream-diff
tools.description: Diff aggregate state between two sequence positions, showing which fields changed and their before/after values

tools.name: health-status
tools.description: Get comprehensive system health including event throughput, error rates, and DAPR component status

tools.name: session-get-context
tools.description: Get the current investigation session context (active tenant and domain scope)

tools.name: causation-chain
tools.description: Trace the full causation chain for an event — originating command, all events produced, and affected projections

sequenceNumber.description: Event sequence number to trace from

tools.name: session-clear-context
tools.description: Clear the investigation session context to remove tenant and domain scope

tools.name: types-list
tools.description: Discover all registered event types, command types, and aggregate types in the domain model

domain.description: Filter by domain (uses session context if omitted)

tools.name: projection-detail
tools.description: Get detailed projection information including recent errors and configuration

tools.name: tenant-list
tools.description: List all tenants with their name and status (Active/Disabled)

tools.name: health-dapr
tools.description: Get DAPR infrastructure component health status

tools.name: session-set-context
tools.description: Set or clear tenant and/or domain scope for subsequent queries — reduces parameter repetition and prevents cross-tenant leakage

tenantId.description: Tenant ID to scope queries to

domain.description: Domain name to scope queries to

clearTenantId.description: Set to true to clear the tenant scope

clearDomain.description: Set to true to clear the domain scope

tools.name: consistency-list
tools.description: List data integrity checks with status, scope, and anomaly counts

tenantId.description: Filter by tenant ID (uses session context if omitted)

tools.name: projection-resume
tools.description: Resume a paused projection to restart event processing (requires confirm: true)

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview

tools.name: projection-replay
tools.description: Replay a projection between two event positions (requires confirm: true)

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview

tools.name: tenant-users
tools.description: List users assigned to a tenant with their user IDs and roles

tools.name: consistency-cancel
tools.description: Cancel a running consistency check (requires confirm: true)

confirm.description: Set to true to execute; false returns a preview
